<a name="ExecParams"></a>
## type [ExecParams](<https://github.com/osapi-io/osapi/blob/main/internal/provider/command/types.go#L32-L41>)

ExecParams contains parameters for direct command execution.

```go
type ExecParams struct {
    // Command is the executable name or path.
    Command string
    // Args are the command arguments.
    Args []string
    // Cwd is the optional working directory.
    Cwd string
    // Timeout is the timeout in seconds (0 = default 30s).
    Timeout int
}
```

Executor implements the Provider interface for command execution.

```go
type Executor struct {

```

<a name="Executor.Exec"></a>
### func \(\*Executor\) [Exec](<https://github.com/osapi-io/osapi/blob/main/internal/provider/command/exec.go#L29-L31>)

```go
func (c *Executor) Exec(params ExecParams) (*Result, error)
```

Exec executes a command directly without a shell.

<a name="Executor.Shell"></a>


Shell executes a command through /bin/sh \-c.

<a name="Provider"></a>
## type [Provider](<https://github.com/osapi-io/osapi/blob/main/internal/provider/command/types.go#L24-L29>)

Provider implements the methods to execute commands on the system.

```go
type Provider interface {
    // Exec executes a command directly without a shell.
    Exec(params ExecParams) (*Result, error)
    // Shell executes a command through /bin/sh -c.
    Shell(params ShellParams) (*Result, error)
}
```

<a name="Result"></a>
## type [Result](<https://github.com/osapi-io/osapi/blob/main/internal/provider/command/types.go#L54-L65>)

Result contains the output of a command execution.

```go
type Result struct {
    // Stdout is the standard output.
    Stdout string `json:"stdout"`
    // Stderr is the standard error output.
    Stderr string `json:"stderr"`
    // ExitCode is the process exit code.
    ExitCode int `json:"exit_code"`
    // DurationMs is the execution time in milliseconds.
    DurationMs int64 `json:"duration_ms"`
    // Changed indicates whether the command modified system state.
    Changed bool `json:"changed"`
}
```

<a name="ShellParams"></a>
## type [ShellParams](<https://github.com/osapi-io/osapi/blob/main/internal/provider/command/types.go#L44-L51>)

ShellParams contains parameters for shell command execution.

```go
type ShellParams struct {
    // Command is the full shell command string.
    Command string
    // Cwd is the optional working directory.
    Cwd string
    // Timeout is the timeout in seconds (0 = default 30s).
    Timeout int
}
```
